query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `homeownerReviews` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL,
  `dealId` int NOT NULL,
  `partnerId` int NOT NULL,
  `homeownerEmail` varchar(320),
  `homeownerName` varchar(255),
  `rating` int NOT NULL,
  `reviewText` text,
  `ratingReliability` int,
  `ratingCommunication` int,
  `ratingPayment` int,
  `isPublic` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `homeownerReviews_dealId_customerDeals_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`dealId`) REFERENCES `customerDeals`(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `homeownerReviews_partnerId_partners_id_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`partnerId`) REFERENCES `partners`(`id`)
);
